task_description: Fix all testing bugs (Pomodoro auto-start, invisible timer text, chat scroll, AI toasts, dashboard blank, mic errors, remove Cmd+K) and add Sprint 5 features (calendar event editing with drag-to-reschedule)

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. npm run lint passes with no errors. npm test has 1 pre-existing failure (react-markdown ESM import in jest) that is unrelated to our changes - confirmed same failure exists on base branch. All 3 features implemented successfully across 6 commits.
